roadmap.title: Establish a base and catch early Pals
roadmap.description: Finish the tutorial loop, catch common species, reveal nearby areas, and pick up the first simple unlocks.

roadmap.title: Clear the early towers and open core systems
roadmap.description: Follow the first tower route while starting Labor Research, expeditions, fishing, faction bases, and regional effigy collection.

roadmap.title: Build the midgame account grind
roadmap.description: Push collection totals, dungeons, crafting, raids, surveys, trust, and the remaining mainland regions.

roadmap.title: Finish the pre-1.0 endgame
roadmap.description: Clear Sakurajima and Feybreak, capture legendaries, finish raid and Oil Rig goals, and prepare for the sky islands.

roadmap.title: Conquer Sunreach
roadmap.description: Enter Sunreach, complete its tower route, work through Arena ranks, and prepare the Panthalus path.

roadmap.title: Enter the World Tree and finish 100%
roadmap.description: Open the World Tree, perform an Awakening, defeat the final story encounter, and clean up the remaining effigies.

achievements.description: Defeat Zoe & Grizzbolt, the first Tower Boss duo.
achievements.summary: Defeat Zoe & Grizzbolt, the first Tower Boss duo.

guide.context: Defeat Zoe & Grizzbolt, the first Tower Boss duo. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Travel to the Tower of the Rayne Syndicate, located in the Windswept Hills (an area marked by hills of red grass).
Aim to be around level 10 before entering, as this is the easiest of the five tower fights.
Bring Ground-type Pals or attacks, since Grizzbolt is an Electric-type Pal and weak to Ground damage.
Enter the tower and defeat both Zoe and Grizzbolt to trigger the achievement.

achievements.description: Defeat Lily & Lyleen, the second Tower Boss duo.
achievements.summary: Defeat Lily & Lyleen, the second Tower Boss duo.

guide.context: Defeat Lily & Lyleen, the second Tower Boss duo. Recommended level: 20-25

steps.text: Travel to the Tower of the Free Pal Alliance, atop the Frostbound Mountains (near coordinates 182, 29–30).
Bring Fire-type Pals or attacks, since Lyleen is a Grass-type Pal and weak to Fire damage.
Use the arena's pillars as cover, since Lily and Lyleen attack from range with Grass, Water, and Dark-type moves and rarely give much of a gap between attacks.
Target Lily directly when she's mounted on Lyleen for extra damage, if you get the opportunity.
Defeat both to unlock the achievement
steps.note: Recommended level: 20-25

achievements.description: Defeat Marcus & Faleris, the fourth Tower Boss duo.
achievements.summary: Defeat Marcus & Faleris, the fourth Tower Boss duo.

guide.context: Defeat Marcus & Faleris, the fourth Tower Boss duo. Recommended level: 45-50

steps.text: Travel to the Tower of the PIDF, located in the Desiccated Desert in the northeast of the map (crossing the ocean is required to reach it).
Bring Water-type Pals or attacks, since Faleris is a Fire-type Pal and weak to Water damage.
Prepare well before entering, as by this point the fight demands stronger gear and higher-level Pals than the earlier towers.
Defeat both to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Recommended level: 45-50

achievements.description: Defeat Axel & Orserk, the third Tower Boss duo.
achievements.summary: Defeat Axel & Orserk, the third Tower Boss duo.

guide.context: Defeat Axel & Orserk, the third Tower Boss duo. Recommended level: 40-45

steps.text: Travel to the Tower of the Brothers of the Eternal Pyre, at the top of Mount Obsidian in the southwest Volcano Biome.
Craft and equip Heat Resistant armor before making the trek, since the surrounding region is scorching.
Bring Ground-type and/or Ice-type Pals, since Orserk is a Dragon/Electric-type Pal weak to both.
Bring a strong ranged weapon (shotgun, assault rifle, or rocket launcher if available); melee weapons are largely ineffective here.
Use the arena's pillars as cover against Orserk's ranged attacks, and target Axel directly when possible, as he's the boss's weak point.
Defeat both to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Recommended level: 40-45

achievements.description: Defeat Victor & Shadowbeak, the fifth and final base-game Tower Boss duo.
achievements.summary: Defeat Victor & Shadowbeak, the fifth and final base-game Tower Boss duo.

guide.context: Defeat Victor & Shadowbeak, the fifth and final base-game Tower Boss duo. Recommended level 50.

steps.text: Travel to the Tower of the PAL Genetic Research Unit, located in the Astral Mountains / Land of Absolute Zero in the north (crossing the ocean is required).
Aim to be at least level 45, ideally 50, since this is one of the toughest base-game fights.
Bring Dragon-type Pals for strong damage, though be cautious: Shadowbeak also uses a lot of Ice attacks, so Dragon Pals can be vulnerable to being frozen mid-fight.
Craft a legendary weapon if possible (a Rocket Launcher is commonly recommended) for extra damage.
Consider crafting Memory Wiping Medicine beforehand to reallocate stat points purely toward combat stats for this fight.
Defeat both Victor and Shadowbeak to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Recommended level 50.

achievements.summary: Catch your first Pal of any kind.

guide.context: Catch your first Pal of any kind. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Craft a Pal Sphere.
Find any wild Pal and throw the sphere at it.
Achievement unlocks on your first successful catch.

guide.context: Catch 10 different kinds of Pals. Shinies don't count as a new kind. Elemental/recolor variants (Aqua, Noct, Cryst, etc.) do count.

steps.text: Keep catching Pals, prioritizing species you don't already have.
Explore beyond your starting area for new species.
Check your Paldex to track unique kinds caught.
steps.note: Shinies don't count as a new kind. Elemental/recolor variants (Aqua, Noct, Cryst, etc.) do count.

guide.context: Catch 20 different kinds of Pals. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Explore multiple biomes, since each region has different native Pals.
Check dungeons and Alpha Pal spawns; some species only appear there.
Use your Paldex to target missing species.

guide.context: Catch 50 different kinds of Pals. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Visit multiple map regions deliberately to cover more native species.
Craft better Pal Spheres for tougher catches.
Use a Paldeck wiki/tracker to identify what you're missing.

guide.context: Catch 90 different kinds of Pals. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Fully explore the map, including remote areas.
Hunt down remaining dungeon-exclusive and Alpha Pal species.
Hunt for missing elemental/recolor variants, which count as separate kinds.
Use a Paldeck tracker to close out the last few missing entries.

guide.context: Summon and defeat Bellanoir. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Farm dungeons (level 35 or below) for Bellanoir Slab fragments; you need 4 to craft a Slab.
Build a Summoning Altar at your base (unlocked at level 33).
Place the Slab in the Altar to start the fight.
Bring strong Dragon-type Pals, since Bellanoir is Dark-type.
Defeat it within the 10-minute time limit.

achievements.description: Summon and defeat Bellanoir Libero, the upgraded version of the Bellanoir raid boss.
achievements.summary: Summon and defeat Bellanoir Libero, the upgraded version of the Bellanoir raid boss.

guide.context: Summon and defeat Bellanoir Libero, the upgraded version of the Bellanoir raid boss. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Farm dungeons (level 35+) for Bellanoir Libero Slab fragments; craft a Slab from 4 fragments.
Place the Slab in a Summoning Altar to start the fight.
Bring Dragon-type Pals for the first phase.
Around 50,000 HP remaining, it heals and switches to Ice-type, so keep a strong Fire-type Pal ready too.
Defeat it within 10 minutes.

achievements.description: Defeat Saya & Selyne at the Moonflower Tower.
achievements.summary: Defeat Saya & Selyne at the Moonflower Tower.

guide.context: Defeat Saya & Selyne at the Moonflower Tower. Defeating Saya & Selyne is also what unlocks Hard Mode for all Tower Bosses, which you'll need for Champion of the Palpagos Islands.

steps.text: Travel to Sakurajima Island, in the northwest part of the map, and find the Moonflower Tower near its center (around coordinates -597, 205).
Aim to be around level 55, with your Pals close to that level as well.
Bring Dragon-type Pals, since Selyne is a Dark/Neutral-type Pal weak to Dragon damage.
Craft or equip your best gear beforehand — Plasteel Armor and a Rocket Launcher (or Laser Rifle) are commonly recommended.
Use the arena's pillars for cover against ranged attacks, and keep moving since both bosses attack from range often.
Defeat both within the 10-minute time limit to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Defeating Saya & Selyne is also what unlocks Hard Mode for all Tower Bosses, which you'll need for Champion of the Palpagos Islands.

achievements.description: Summon and defeat Blazamut Ryu, a raid boss.
achievements.summary: Summon and defeat Blazamut Ryu, a raid boss.

guide.context: Summon and defeat Blazamut Ryu, a raid boss. Filling your raid base with extra Pals beforehand lets them join the fight automatically and help chip away at its large HP pool.

steps.text: Farm level 45+ dungeons for Blazamut Ryu Slab fragments; 4 fragments craft a full Slab.
Build a Summoning Altar (unlocked around level 33) at an open base and place the Slab in it to start the fight.
Bring Ice and Water-type Pals for the first phase, since Blazamut Ryu starts as a Dragon/Fire-type Pal.

Once it drops to around 50,000 HP remaining, it heals about a third of its HP and switches to Electric-type, so also bring a Ground-type Pal and pull out any Water-type Pals, since they'll now be vulnerable.
Bring a well-stocked Assault Rifle and Rocket Launcher, and defeat it within the 10-minute time limit.
steps.note: Filling your raid base with extra Pals beforehand lets them join the fight automatically and help chip away at its large HP pool.

guide.context: Catch 140 different kinds of Pals There are more than 140 total Pal designs and variants in the game, so this achievement doesn't require catching every single one. only 140 unique entries.

steps.text: Build on the earlier Pal Tamer tiers by continuing to catch unique species.
Explore newer map regions/islands, since the last several kinds needed are usually found there.
Use a Paldeck tracker to find what you're missing.
steps.note: There are more than 140 total Pal designs and variants in the game, so this achievement doesn't require catching every single one. only 140 unique entries.

achievements.summary: Catch a cumulative total of 1,000 Pals.

guide.context: Catch a cumulative total of 1,000 Pals. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Keep catching Pals as you normally play; repeats count toward the total.
Achievement unlocks automatically at 1,000 lifetime captures.

achievements.summary: Catch a Human NPC using a Pal Sphere.

guide.context: Catch a Human NPC using a Pal Sphere. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Find a Human NPC (not a story character) out in the world.
Weaken them, then throw a Pal Sphere at them like you would a Pal.

achievements.description: Catch Jetragon, a Legendary Dragon-type Pal.
achievements.summary: Catch Jetragon, a Legendary Dragon-type Pal.

guide.context: Catch Jetragon, a Legendary Dragon-type Pal. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Travel to the northwest coast of Mount Obsidian, on the western part of the map. Bring heat-resistant armor for the trip.
Bring Ice-type Pals, since Jetragon is weak to Ice.
Craft Legendary Pal Spheres ahead of time; standard spheres have very low success against it.
Bring your strongest ranged weapon (a Rocket Launcher works well) and time your shots for when Jetragon is locked into an attack animation, since it's fast and can be hard to hit otherwise.
Weaken it in combat, then throw spheres until it's caught.

guide.context: Catch Paladius. If one of the pair is defeated or caught, the other can disappear from the fight, so try to manage both at similar health before committing to a catch attempt.

steps.text: Travel to the northern Desiccated (Desecrated) Desert, near the Deep Sand Dunes fast travel point.
Pack both heat- and cold-resistant gear, since this desert swings between very hot and very cold depending on the time of day.
Bring a Dark or Dragon-type Pal to counter Paladius; a Dark/Dragon hybrid like Astegon works against both it and Necromus at once.
Bring plenty of Legendary Pal Spheres (some guides recommend having 50+ on hand) plus a strong ranged weapon like a Rocket Launcher or Assault Rifle.
Time your approach around day/night: one of the pair sleeps while the other stays active, letting you fight them one at a time instead of both together.
Weaken and catch Paladius once you've dealt with (or avoided waking) Necromus.
steps.note: If one of the pair is defeated or caught, the other can disappear from the fight, so try to manage both at similar health before committing to a catch attempt.

guide.context: Catch Necromus. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Travel to the same northern desert spot as Paladius; they spawn together.
Bring heat/cold-resistant gear for the desert's temperature swings.
Bring a Dragon-type or Dark/Dragon-type Pal (Astegon is a strong pick) to counter Necromus.
Stock up on Legendary Pal Spheres, since anything lower has a very poor catch rate against a Level 50+ Legendary.
Use the day/night cycle to isolate Necromus if possible, then weaken and catch it.

guide.context: Catch Frostallion. Recommended level: 45-55

steps.text: Travel to the northwest area of the Astral Mountains.
Bring Fire-type or Dragon-type Pals to counter its Ice attacks.
Craft Legendary Pal Spheres for a realistic catch chance.
Weaken it in combat, then throw spheres until caught.
steps.note: Recommended level: 45-55

achievements.summary: Collect 40 lore Notes scattered around the map.

guide.context: Collect 40 lore Notes scattered around the map. Some players have reported this achievement not triggering even after collecting all available Notes on an older save; grabbing one more Note (if any remain) can sometimes force it to register.

steps.text: Look for glowing pedestals around the islands; Notes emit a blue glow similar to Lifmunk Effigies (don't confuse the two).
Interact with each pedestal to collect its Note.
Check your progress anytime via Esc → Journals.
The achievement unlocks once you've collected 40.
steps.note: Some players have reported this achievement not triggering even after collecting all available Notes on an older save; grabbing one more Note (if any remain) can sometimes force it to register.

guide.context: Collect 255 Lifmunk Effigies. Effigies can be easy to miss from certain angles, so circle areas rather than flying straight past them.

steps.text: Explore the map looking for Lifmunk Effigies, which are often tucked into cliffside nooks and hard-to-reach spots.
Get a strong flying mount (Ragnahawk, Faleris, or Jetragon are good picks) to make searching cliffs and peaks much easier.
Keep collecting until your total reaches 255; the achievement unlocks at that point.
steps.note: Effigies can be easy to miss from certain angles, so circle areas rather than flying straight past them.

achievements.description: Maximized the rank of a Pal
achievements.summary: Max out a single Pal's condense rank (4 stars)

guide.context: Max out a single Pal's condense rank (4 stars) Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Catch multiple copies of the same Pal species. Use a common, easy-to-catch Pal like Vixy to make this faster.
Use the Palbox's condensing feature to feed duplicate Pals into one target Pal, raising its star rank each time.
Repeat until that one Pal reaches the maximum condense rank of 4 stars.

achievements.summary: Max out the condense rank (4 stars) of 5 different Pals.

guide.context: Max out the condense rank (4 stars) of 5 different Pals. Breeding your own combat Pals to max rank works too, but takes noticeably longer than mass-catching a common Pal.

steps.text: Pick a Pal that's easy to catch in bulk (Gobfin is a common choice; the Goblin's Turf area has many of them close together).
With good Capture Power and higher-tier spheres, catch large numbers of that Pal without needing to weaken them first.
Feed the duplicates into one target Pal at the Palbox to raise its condense rank to 4 stars.
Repeat this process for 4 more Pals (they can be different species) until you've maxed 5 total.
steps.note: Breeding your own combat Pals to max rank works too, but takes noticeably longer than mass-catching a common Pal.

guide.context: Clear 20 dungeons. Dungeon loot often includes Slab Fragments needed for later raid-boss achievements, so this pairs naturally with Twilight Siren/Eclipsed Siren progress.

steps.text: Find dungeon entrances scattered around the map (they appear as cave openings on the terrain).
Fight through to the final chamber, where an Alpha Pal guards the exit gate.
Defeat or catch the Alpha Pal to unlock the gate and reach the main loot chests.
Repeat across 20 different dungeons; the achievement unlocks once you've cleared your 20th.
steps.note: Dungeon loot often includes Slab Fragments needed for later raid-boss achievements, so this pairs naturally with Twilight Siren/Eclipsed Siren progress.

achievements.summary: Seize the Rayne Syndicate Oil Rig.

guide.context: Seize the Rayne Syndicate Oil Rig. Turrets generally won't target you while you're unmounted and swimming, so alternating between riding in and swimming the last stretch can reduce incoming damage.

steps.text: Travel to the late-game Oil Rig southeast of Marsh Island at approximately (580, -430) and approach on a fast flying mount; dismount and swim the final stretch if the anti-air lasers become overwhelming.
Climb a support strut if you are knocked into the water, then clear the deck in small groups.
Search the rig for the large yellow/golden loot chest rather than the smaller purple chests.
Clear nearby defenders before interacting with the large chest so combat does not interrupt the action.
Open the large yellow/golden chest; the achievement appears when that rig chest is successfully opened.
steps.note: Turrets generally won't target you while you're unmounted and swimming, so alternating between riding in and swimming the last stretch can reduce incoming damage.

achievements.description: Defeat all 6 Tower Bosses on Hard Mode.
achievements.summary: Defeat all 6 Tower Bosses on Hard Mode.

guide.context: Defeat all 6 Tower Bosses on Hard Mode. Do this after fully gearing up, since Hard Mode is meaningfully tougher than the original fights and punishes being underprepared.

steps.text: Defeat the six original tower duos on Normal: Zoe & Grizzbolt, Lily & Lyleen, Axel & Orserk, Marcus & Faleris, Victor & Shadowbeak, and Saya & Selyne.
Return to each of those six towers, interact with its entrance, and select Hard Mode.
Prepare max-level, enhanced Pals and endgame weapons because Hard Mode raises boss health and adds attacks.
Defeat those same six duos on Hard Mode; the achievement appears after the sixth Hard Mode victory.
steps.note: Do this after fully gearing up, since Hard Mode is meaningfully tougher than the original fights and punishes being underprepared.

achievements.summary: Craft 2,000 Pal Spheres of any type (regular ones count).

guide.context: Craft 2,000 Pal Spheres of any type (regular ones count). It's easiest to knock this out late-game when you have surplus materials and Pals farming resources for you.

steps.text: Unlock the Pal Sphere crafting recipe early on; the cheapest, most basic sphere works fine for this.
Stock up on the required materials (Paldium Fragments and wood, for the basic sphere) and mass-produce them at a workbench.
Keep crafting until your lifetime total hits 2,000.
steps.note: It's easiest to knock this out late-game when you have surplus materials and Pals farming resources for you.

guide.context: Craft 10,000 Ingots. Crafting Charcoal at the same furnace also counts toward this total, so you don't need to make only Ingots.

steps.text: Build a base near a cluster of Ore nodes so you have a steady raw material supply.
Set up a furnace (Primitive, Improved, or Electric) and staff it with a Pal that has strong Kindling. Jormuntide Ignis is a good high-level option.
Keep smelting Ore into Ingots (afk-friendly with enough Ore stockpiled) until you hit 10,000.
steps.note: Crafting Charcoal at the same furnace also counts toward this total, so you don't need to make only Ingots.

guide.context: Craft 20,000 Ammo of any type. This pairs well with Sphere Craftsman and Iron Heart since all three are large crafting totals best knocked out passively over time.

steps.text: Set up a Weapons Workbench (or higher-tier equivalent) at your base.
Use Arrows if you want the cheapest option, since they only cost 1 wood and 1 stone each.
Assign a Pal with high Handiwork (Anubis is a strong pick) to speed up crafting.
Keep a steady supply of Stone and Wood coming in (a Logging Site and Stone Pit help automate this) and keep crafting until you hit 20,000.
steps.note: This pairs well with Sphere Craftsman and Iron Heart since all three are large crafting totals best knocked out passively over time.

achievements.description: Defeat Bjorn & Bastigor, the Feybreak Island Tower Boss.
achievements.summary: Defeat Bjorn & Bastigor, the Feybreak Island Tower Boss.

guide.context: Defeat Bjorn & Bastigor, the Feybreak Island Tower Boss. This is a level 60 fight, so both you and your Pals should be near the level cap before attempting it. You'll also need to clear three Alpha Pal bounties (Dazzi Noct, Caprity Noct, and Omascul) before this boss becomes accessible.

steps.text: Travel to Feybreak Island, head to the Scorched Ashland area, then west to the Frozen Coral Hill region where the tower sits.
Equip cold-resistant armor and accessories before entering; the area (and the boss's ice attacks) will otherwise drain your health.
Bring Fire-type Pals, since Bastigor is an Ice-type Pal.
Use the arena's pillars for cover, but stay alert since some of Bastigor's charged attacks can pierce cover.
Target Bjorn directly when possible, since he's considered the weak point of the duo.
Defeat both within the 10-minute time limit to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: This is a level 60 fight, so both you and your Pals should be near the level cap before attempting it. You'll also need to clear three Alpha Pal bounties (Dazzi Noct, Caprity Noct, and Omascul) before this boss becomes accessible.

achievements.description: Summon and defeat Xenolord, a raid boss exclusive to Feybreak Island.
achievements.summary: Summon and defeat Xenolord, a raid boss exclusive to Feybreak Island.

guide.context: Summon and defeat Xenolord, a raid boss exclusive to Feybreak Island. This is one of the toughest fights in the game, with well over 1 million HP, so go in with max-level, fully condensed Pals.

steps.text: Unlock the Summoning Altar and Pal Expedition Station from the Technology Tree.
Open chests in Feybreak dungeons and around Feybreak Alpha encounters, or run high-tier Feybreak expeditions, until you obtain 4 Xenolord Slab Fragments.
Craft a Xenolord Slab from the 4 fragments at a workbench.
Build a Summoning Altar at a separate expendable base, place the slab in it, and confirm the summon.
Bring Dragon- or Ice-type Pals, stay mobile against Xenolord, and destroy the Xenovader/Xenogard adds it summons.
Defeat Xenolord before the raid timer expires to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: This is one of the toughest fights in the game, with well over 1 million HP, so go in with max-level, fully condensed Pals.

guide.context: Collect 300 Lifmunk Effigies. If you already had 300+ effigies collected before this achievement existed, it can sometimes trigger simply by logging in after updating your game.

steps.text: Continue collecting Lifmunk Effigies as you explore, the same way as for Palpagos Guru.
Use a strong flying mount to reach cliffside and hard-to-access spots more easily.
Keep going past 255 until your total reaches 300, unlocking the achievement.
steps.note: If you already had 300+ effigies collected before this achievement existed, it can sometimes trigger simply by logging in after updating your game.

guide.context: Complete 10 Pal Labor Research projects. Most research requires Ancient Pal Manuscripts, obtainable from expeditions or by turning in Bounty Tokens to a Bounty Officer. Also, building multiple labs lets several Pals work on the same research at once, speeding up completion.

steps.text: Build a Pal Labor Research Laboratory (unlocked at level 20, costs 2 Technology Points).
Select a Research Subject (Handiwork, Kindling, Watering, Mining, etc.) and begin research.
Assign a Pal whose Work Suitability level matches or exceeds the research level, since research won't progress without one.
Manually assign the Pal via the Monitoring Stand if it doesn't jump on the task itself; research is treated as a low base-priority and gets skipped for other jobs otherwise.
Repeat across different subjects until you've completed 10 total research projects.
steps.note: Most research requires Ancient Pal Manuscripts, obtainable from expeditions or by turning in Bounty Tokens to a Bounty Officer. Also, building multiple labs lets several Pals work on the same research at once, speeding up completion.

guide.context: Complete 30 Pal Labor Research projects. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Continue researching subjects at your Pal Labor Research Laboratory.
Prioritize subjects tied to your base's biggest bottlenecks (e.g. Generating Electricity if power is an issue).
Keep a steady supply of Ancient Pal Manuscripts coming in via expeditions or bounty turn-ins, since most projects need them.
Higher-tier research needs Pals with higher Work Suitability (up to level 4), so condensing or breeding stronger workers helps speed things along.
The achievement unlocks once your total completed research projects reaches 30.

guide.context: Complete 70 Pal Labor Research projects. Since this builds on Pal Labor Student (10) and Pal Labor Researcher (30), ordinary progress toward this achievement gives you the earlier two automatically.

steps.text: Keep researching subjects at your Pal Labor Research Laboratory, same as for the earlier tiers.
Prioritize cheaper, lower-tier research projects as you go, since there are 150 total and you only need 70 for this achievement.
Keep a steady stream of Ancient Pal Manuscripts coming in, ideally by running a Pal Expedition at each of your bases, since higher-tier research gets expensive.
Continue until your total completed research projects reaches 70.
steps.note: Since this builds on Pal Labor Student (10) and Pal Labor Researcher (30), ordinary progress toward this achievement gives you the earlier two automatically.

guide.context: Undertake 10 Pal Expeditions. Verdant Hollow is commonly recommended as the fastest, lowest-requirement expedition to repeat for this achievement.

steps.text: Unlock the Pal Expedition Station from the Technology menu at level 15 (costs 2 Technology Points).
Build it at a base; it's a large structure, so make sure you have the space (only the front half needs to be inside your base boundary).
Interact with it and send Pals out on a mission; each expedition takes a set amount of time and returns Pals with items based on the mission chosen.
Note that some expedition missions only unlock after you've beaten the corresponding Tower Boss, so you may need to have cleared some bosses on Normal mode first.
Repeat until you've sent out 10 expeditions total.
steps.note: Verdant Hollow is commonly recommended as the fastest, lowest-requirement expedition to repeat for this achievement.

guide.context: Undertake 20 Pal Expeditions. Certain Pal Labor Research projects (in the Lumbering and Mining trees) reduce expedition time by up to 20%, so researching those first can make this faster.

steps.text: Keep sending Pals out on expeditions.
Build a Pal Expedition Station at multiple bases if you want to run several expeditions in parallel and speed things up.
Pick a low-risk, quick mission and repeat it if you just want the achievement without caring about specific rewards.
Level up and condense your Pals to increase their firepower, which speeds up how quickly each expedition completes.
Continue until your total expeditions undertaken reaches 20.
steps.note: Certain Pal Labor Research projects (in the Lumbering and Mining trees) reduce expedition time by up to 20%, so researching those first can make this faster.

achievements.summary: Discover 10 new areas on the map.

guide.context: Discover 10 new areas on the map. If you're having trouble finding new areas later on, Towers and Sealed Realms often have nearby undiscovered spots.

steps.text: Explore the map normally; discovering a new named location shows its name on screen and usually grants a small amount of XP.
Visit different biomes, islands, and regions rather than re-exploring the same area, since only new discoveries count.
The achievement unlocks once you've found 10 distinct areas.
steps.note: If you're having trouble finding new areas later on, Towers and Sealed Realms often have nearby undiscovered spots.

achievements.summary: Discover 30 new areas on the map.

guide.context: Discover 30 new areas on the map. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Keep exploring the map, visiting new biomes, islands, and regions.
Check unexplored corners of the map you haven't been to, since only new discoveries count toward the total.
The achievement unlocks once you've found 30 distinct areas.

achievements.summary: Discover 70 new areas on the map.

guide.context: Discover 70 new areas on the map. Areas count as distinct named regions on the map (a new island or biome), not every possible landmark.

steps.text: Continue exploring past the 30 required for Junior Surveyor.
Visit less obvious spots like remote islands, dungeons, and areas around Towers and Sealed Realms, since these often have undiscovered locations nearby.
The achievement unlocks once your discovered area count reaches 70.
steps.note: Areas count as distinct named regions on the map (a new island or biome), not every possible landmark.

achievements.description: Defeat a Predator Pal, a stronger variant of a normal wild Pal.
achievements.summary: Defeat a Predator Pal, a stronger variant of a normal wild Pal.

guide.context: Defeat a Predator Pal, a stronger variant of a normal wild Pal. Predator Pals have set possible spawn locations but aren't guaranteed to be there every time; using a community map tool to check known spawns can help. One easy spawn to check is near the Bridge of the Twin Knights, between the Autumn Rocks and the Crescent Moon Shore.

steps.text: Look out for a Predator Pal while exploring; they're much larger than normal, have glowing red eyes, and emit an ominous heartbeat sound when nearby.
Note that Predator Pals can't be caught in a Pal Sphere, so you'll need to defeat them in combat instead.
Engage and defeat it to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Predator Pals have set possible spawn locations but aren't guaranteed to be there every time; using a community map tool to check known spawns can help. One easy spawn to check is near the Bridge of the Twin Knights, between the Autumn Rocks and the Crescent Moon Shore.

achievements.description: Defeat the Attack Chopper, a mini-boss unique to Feybreak Island.
achievements.summary: Defeat the Attack Chopper, a mini-boss unique to Feybreak Island.

guide.context: Defeat the Attack Chopper, a mini-boss unique to Feybreak Island. Defeating it unlocks the cage around the chest, giving you access to the loot inside.

steps.text: Head to the Rayne Syndicate Platform Oil Rig, off the southwest coast of Feybreak Island (a level 60 area).
Attempt to hack the cage around the large chest at the top of the rig; doing this summons the Attack Chopper.
Glide down to the lower deck and use the double-story platform as cover, since most of its attacks can't reach you there.
Bring at least Plasteel Armor and a Rocket Launcher (a Guided Missile Launcher makes aiming easier).
Aim for the tip of the Chopper's body for critical hits, and defeat it to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Defeating it unlocks the cage around the chest, giving you access to the loot inside.

guide.context: Reel in 10 Pals through fishing. This is an easy one to knock out early with basic gear near any base with water access.

steps.text: Unlock the Beginner Fishing Set from the Technology tree (tier 15, costs 2 Technology Points).
Craft it and use it at any body of water around the Palpagos Islands.
Fish and reel in any combination of Pals; any species counts toward the total.
The achievement unlocks once you've reeled in 10 Pals this way.
steps.note: This is an easy one to knock out early with basic gear near any base with water access.

guide.context: Reel in 30 Pals through fishing. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Keep fishing at any body of water with your fishing rod.
Reel in any combination of Pals; species doesn't matter for this achievement.
The achievement unlocks once your total reeled-in Pals reaches 30.

guide.context: Reel in 50 Pals through fishing. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Continue fishing past the 30 needed for Seasoned Angler.
Any mix of Pal species counts, so keep reeling near a convenient body of water.
The achievement unlocks once your total reaches 50.

achievements.summary: Reel in 1 Lunker, a rare, harder-to-catch fish variant.

guide.context: Reel in 1 Lunker, a rare, harder-to-catch fish variant. exact Lunker fishing spots may vary between game worlds, so treat these coordinates as a starting point rather than guaranteed locations.

steps.text: Head to a fishing spot known for Lunkers; one is on the west coast around coordinates -408, -825, another around 920, 208.
Equip your best available fishing rod, since Lunkers are noticeably harder to reel in than regular fish.
Cast and reel until you successfully land one.
The achievement unlocks on your first successful Lunker catch.
steps.note: exact Lunker fishing spots may vary between game worlds, so treat these coordinates as a starting point rather than guaranteed locations.

achievements.description: Reached Silver Rank in the Arena
achievements.summary: Reach Silver Rank in the Arena.

guide.context: Reach Silver Rank in the Arena. Diversifying your team's types helps avoid bad matchups that can knock Pals out quickly against varied opponents.

steps.text: Head to the Arena, located south of the Desiccated Desert.
Enter Arena matches and defeat opponents to earn points and rank up.
Keep battling until your rank reaches Silver.
steps.note: Diversifying your team's types helps avoid bad matchups that can knock Pals out quickly against varied opponents.

achievements.description: Reached Master Rank in the Arena
achievements.summary: Reach Master Rank in the Arena.

guide.context: Reach Master Rank in the Arena. If you're struggling, adjusting world settings (higher damage dealt, lower damage taken) can make Arena fights more manageable.

steps.text: Enter the Arena's PvE Challenge mode and win through Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, and Diamond in that order.
Continue winning at Diamond until the rank screen promotes you to Master.
Use a three-Pal team with broad element coverage and replace weak matchups between attempts.
The achievement appears as soon as the Arena rank display changes to Master.
steps.note: If you're struggling, adjusting world settings (higher damage dealt, lower damage taken) can make Arena fights more manageable.

achievements.description: Reached Trust level 10 with a Pal
achievements.summary: Reach Trust level 10 with a Pal.

guide.context: Reach Trust level 10 with a Pal. Kinship Peaches can be looted from enemy faction base chests or bought from the Vigilante Bounty Officer for 15 Bounty Tokens.

steps.text: Keep a specific Pal in your active party; Trust slowly rises the more it fights and travels alongside you.
Feed it a Kinship Peach to speed things up if you want to boost Trust faster.
Continue until that Pal reaches Trust level 10.
steps.note: Kinship Peaches can be looted from enemy faction base chests or bought from the Vigilante Bounty Officer for 15 Bounty Tokens.

guide.context: Clear 1 enemy faction base. exact base locations aren't consistent between game worlds, so there's no reliable coordinate list to follow.

steps.text: Search open, flat areas around the map for enemy faction bases; they spawn randomly rather than in fixed locations.
Fight through the base room by room; layouts vary slightly each time but the approach stays the same.
Find and open the large golden chest inside, usually in one of the final rooms.
Opening it triggers the achievement.
steps.note: exact base locations aren't consistent between game worlds, so there's no reliable coordinate list to follow.

guide.context: Clear 10 enemy faction bases. Complete the listed action chain on one character/world where the game tracks the objective.

steps.text: Repeat the same process as Successful Infiltration across different enemy faction bases.
Keep clearing rooms and opening the golden chest in each base to have it count toward your total.
The achievement unlocks once you've cleared 10 bases total.

guide.context: Find 5 treasures using Treasure Maps. This pairs naturally with Successful Infiltration and Unstoppable Streak, since clearing faction bases is also how you get the maps.

steps.text: Loot Treasure Maps from enemy faction bases as you clear them.
Use a Treasure Map from your inventory; an icon will appear on your map marking the treasure's location.
Travel to the marked spot and dig up or collect the treasure.
Repeat until you've found 5 treasures this way.
steps.note: This pairs naturally with Successful Infiltration and Unstoppable Streak, since clearing faction bases is also how you get the maps.

guide.context: Obtain 5 Pal Bounty Tokens. You can check which Bounty Tokens you've already collected under Key Items in your inventory, and this can unlock retroactively if you already had 5+ before the achievement was added.

steps.text: Look for Alpha Pals marked with icons on the map; some roam freely, some guard the end of dungeons, and some are found in their own Sealed Realms.
Defeat or capture an Alpha Pal for the first time to earn a Bounty Token.
Target low-level Alphas in starter areas if you're early game, since they're the easiest to clear.
Repeat until you've earned 5 tokens.
steps.note: You can check which Bounty Tokens you've already collected under Key Items in your inventory, and this can unlock retroactively if you already had 5+ before the achievement was added.

guide.context: Obtain 20 Pal Bounty Tokens. You can check your current Bounty Token count under Key Items in your inventory.

steps.text: Keep defeating or capturing Alpha Pals for the first time, the same way as for Rookie Pal Slayer.
Check the map for Alpha Pal icons, including free-roaming ones, dungeon-guarding ones, and those inside Sealed Realms.
Work through higher-level Alphas as you progress, since you'll likely run out of easy starter-area ones before reaching 20.
Continue until your total Bounty Tokens reaches 20.
steps.note: You can check your current Bounty Token count under Key Items in your inventory.

guide.context: Defeat a summoned Hartalis. Bringing friends or extra Pals to help split aggro during the shield phases makes this fight considerably more manageable.

steps.text: Unlock the Summoning Altar from the Technology Tree (around level 32, for 3 Ancient Technology Points) and craft it with Stone and Paldium Fragments.

Gather 4 Hartalis Slab Fragments, found in dungeon and cave chests (some sources specify Feybreak Realm dungeons specifically) or as Pal Expedition rewards, then craft them into a Hartalis Slab at a workbench.
Build your Summoning Altar at a separate, expendable base or use the dedicated Raid Area option, since the fight can destroy nearby structures.
Place the Slab in the Altar and summon Hartalis to begin the fight; you'll have a 10-minute time limit.
In the first phase, Hartalis is Water/Grass-type; bring strong Electric-type Pals and attacks.

Watch for a barrier Hartalis raises partway through the fight; an on-screen prompt tells you which element to hit it with (commonly Fire or Electric) — break it in time or take cover, since failing to break it can wipe your whole team.

Once its HP hits 0 (or 1, depending on the source), it heals fully and becomes a Neutral-type Pal for phase two; swap in Dark-type Pals and attacks, and expect another timed barrier requiring Dark damage.
Watch for a final wipe mechanic near the end of the fight, where taking cover is necessary to survive.
Defeat it to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Bringing friends or extra Pals to help split aggro during the shield phases makes this fight considerably more manageable.

guide.context: Collect 20 Lamball Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Search the Bamboo Groves, Moonless Shore, and Verdant Brook, the three regions where Lamball Effigies spawn.
Check cliffsides and hidden nooks in each area.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Pengullet Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to Flamepulse Islet, north of the Desiccated Dunes, where Pengullet Effigies are found.
Search cliffsides and hidden nooks across the islet.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Munchill Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Head to the Desiccated Dunes, the desert region where Munchill Effigies are found.
Search cliffsides, dune ridges, and rocky nooks the way you would for Lifmunk Effigies, since they tend to hide in similar spots.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Rooby Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to the Astral Mountains, where Rooby Effigies are found.
Search cliffsides and hidden nooks across the region.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Herbil Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to Sakurajima, the island where Herbil Effigies are found.
Search cliffsides and hidden nooks across the island.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Tanzee Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to Feybreak Island, where Tanzee Effigies are found.
Search cliffsides and forest nooks across the island.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Depresso Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Unlock Sunreach by defeating Bjorn and Bastigor at the Feybreak Tower, then take the portal that appears at the top of the tower.
Search the floating islands of Sunreach for Depresso Effigies, checking cliffsides and hidden nooks.
Collect Effigies until you have 20.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 20 Cattiva Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Enter the World Tree after catching Panthalus and completing the required tower route.
Put Nox in your active party and use its Kuudere Partner Skill to detect nearby Pal Effigies.
Sweep each World Tree biome in overlapping passes, reactivating Kuudere after moving beyond the previous detection area; investigate every returned marker.
Check vertical terrain, ruins, ore clusters, shrine ledges, and the areas around Remnant Riverside and Guilded City Ruins as you clear the markers.
Keep all 20 Cattiva Effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 4 Lunaris Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to the Twilight Dunes, where Lunaris Effigies spawn.
Search cliffsides and nooks in the area, and expect to revisit multiple times since these effigies reportedly have a low spawn chance.
Collect Effigies until you have 4.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 4 Relaxaurus Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to the Astral Mountains, where Relaxaurus Effigies are found.
Search cliffsides and hidden nooks in the area, since these effigies reportedly have a low spawn chance similar to Lunaris Effigies.
Collect Effigies until you have 4.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

guide.context: Collect 4 Yakumo Effigies. Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

steps.text: Travel to Feybreak Island and check the middle of the large stone circle formation in the purple area of the map, where players have found one Yakumo Effigy.
Search the top of the large loop-shaped structures near the center of Feybreak for a second one.
Head into the World Tree and check near the entrance of the main snow point of interest for a third Effigy.
Also inside the World Tree, look high up at a shrine around coordinates (-1911, 1364) for the fourth.
Keep the required effigies unspent in your inventory until the achievement appears.
steps.note: Current 1.0 reports say the tracker checks unspent inventory, so do not offer these effigies at a Statue of Power before the achievement unlocks. This behavior may be patched.

achievements.description: Mutated a Pal for the first time
achievements.summary: Mutate a Pal for the first time.

guide.context: Mutate a Pal for the first time. Mutation is random. Deluxe Vegetable Cake improves the chance, but repeated breeding and hatching may still be required.

steps.text: Build a Breeding Farm at a base, assign one compatible Pal to each parent slot, and place Cake in the farm's box.
Use Deluxe Vegetable Cake when available because it raises the mutation chance, but expect repeated breeding attempts.
Collect each produced egg and hatch it in an Egg Incubator.
Continue until an egg hatches as a mutated Pal with the mutation presentation and unique passive; that first successful hatch unlocks the achievement.
steps.note: Mutation is random. Deluxe Vegetable Cake improves the chance, but repeated breeding and hatching may still be required.

achievements.description: Awakened a Pal for the first time
achievements.summary: Awaken a Pal for the first time.

guide.context: Awaken a Pal for the first time. In the current 1.0 build, one crystal costs 50 Radiant Gems of the target affinity plus 10 bottles of Holy Water from the World Tree.

steps.text: Progress the main story and defeat every Tower Boss across Palpagos, Feybreak, and Sunreach to unlock access to the World Tree.
Complete the Panthalus questline: craft the Echoing Flute from four Echobones, then catch Panthalus at the Deserted Islet to bring down the barrier protecting the World Tree.
Reach level 67 and build an Ancient Workbench, which costs 5 Technology Points to unlock.
Enter the World Tree and fight or catch Pals there to collect Radiant Gems, which match the element of the Pal they dropped from, along with at least 10 World Tree Holy Water.
Use the Ancient Workbench to craft an Awakening Crystal, then apply it to a Pal of the matching element to Awaken it for the first time.
steps.note: In the current 1.0 build, one crystal costs 50 Radiant Gems of the target affinity plus 10 bottles of Holy Water from the World Tree.

achievements.description: Reached legend rank in the arena
achievements.summary: Reach Legend rank in the Arena.

guide.context: Reach Legend rank in the Arena. Arena Challenge is a PvE route available in single-player; no multiplayer connection is required.

steps.text: Travel to the Arena, on a small island south of the Desiccated Desert, reachable by a flying or swimming Pal.
Talk to the Arena attendant and choose Challenge mode.
Win a match at each rank tier in order (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, Master) to unlock the next one.
Keep winning Master-rank matches to build Rank Points until you're promoted into Legend rank.
Bring a well-rounded, high-level, fully condensed team with good type coverage, since Legend-rank opponents are the toughest the Arena offers
steps.note: Arena Challenge is a PvE route available in single-player; no multiplayer connection is required.

guide.context: Defeat Auri and Shaolong. This is a post-1.0 tower fight with a five-minute encounter timer.

steps.text: Defeat Bjorn & Bastigor at Feybreak Tower, then use the newly opened route to Sunreach.
Follow the blue beacons around Sunreach and shut down all six Defense Modules to remove the whirlwind around the central tower.
Enter the Tower of the Azure Covenant and start the Auri & Shaolong battle; the tower timer is five minutes.
Dodge the Dragon attacks during the opening phase and strike Shaolong's damageable blue body areas.
When the arena floods, switch to a fast swimming or flying Pal so you can keep attacking through the Water phase.
Defeat Auri & Shaolong before the five-minute timer reaches zero; the achievement appears on the victory result.
steps.note: This is a post-1.0 tower fight with a five-minute encounter timer.

guide.context: Catch Panthalus. Panthalus must be caught in the scripted capture state; killing it does not satisfy the achievement.

steps.text: Visit the Deserted Islet and speak to the Ancient Civilization Researcher to accept the Panthalus quest.
Collect the Marine Echobone at the whale skull near (124, -524), west of the starting Windswept Hills.
Collect the Silent Echobone near (356, -111), south of Altar of the Windcaller beside the Jormuntide skeleton.
Collect the Seafoam Echobone near (-515, -545), east of Eternal Pyre Tower Entrance inside the whale skull.
Collect the Tidewind Echobone near (-265, 483), west of Land of Absolute Zero on the frozen lake skeleton.

Return all four Echobones to the Researcher and speak again to receive the Faded Schematic. Craft the Echoing Flute from that schematic and the bones at any workbench, then use it at the nearby glowing shrine.
Reduce Panthalus to its scripted capture state and throw a Pal Sphere; catch it rather than killing it to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Panthalus must be caught in the scripted capture state; killing it does not satisfy the achievement.

achievements.description: Set foot within the World Tree
achievements.summary: Set foot within the World Tree.

guide.context: Set foot within the World Tree. Keep the captured Panthalus in the active party when returning to the World Tree barrier.

steps.text: Complete the standard tower route through Auri & Shaolong. At Deserted Islet, find the hatted quest NPC named Ancient Civilization Researcher.
Speak to the Researcher to accept the Panthalus quest, then collect the Marine, Silent, Seafoam, and Tidewind Echobones from the four marked whale skeletons.
Return with all four Echobones and speak to the Researcher again to receive the Faded Schematic.
Craft the Echoing Flute from the schematic and four bones at any workbench, return to the Deserted Islet, and use the flute at the glowing shrine.
Defeat Panthalus into its scripted capture state, catch it with a Pal Sphere, and place the captured Panthalus in the active party.
Return to the World Tree barrier terminal and interact with it while Panthalus is active; enter the newly accessible World Tree to unlock the achievement.
steps.note: Keep the captured Panthalus in the active party when returning to the World Tree barrier.

guide.context: Defeat Astralym. The final-fight tactics are post-1.0 and remain marked unverified where no trusted source confirms exact internal values.

steps.text: Complete the Panthalus route, enter the World Tree, and clear the three marked sub-bosses at the central door.
Collect the eight Key Spheres from the eight standard tower victories across Palpagos, Feybreak, and Sunreach, then use them at the sealed western tower door.
Enter the Sealed Sanctum and fight Zenara & Astralym, moving to the arena edge when the opening room-wide beam begins.
Attack planted tendrils before their charge completes, and use a fast flying mount when overlapping laser grids restrict the floor.
When the late-fight self-destruct warning and its on-screen countdown appear, stay outside the energy tornadoes and finish Astralym before that displayed timer expires.
The achievement appears after Astralym is defeated and the final victory sequence completes.
steps.note: The final-fight tactics are post-1.0 and remain marked unverified where no trusted source confirms exact internal values.
